Get the URL of a CIS study

get_study_url.Rd

Retrieves the URL of a specific CIS study using its study ID.

Usage

get_study_url(study_code)

Arguments

study_code

A string with the study ID.

Value

A string with the URL of the study, or NULL if not found.
